summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend Playwright flows for auth, seeded bookmakers, transactions, bets, calculators, dashboard, reports, and navigation using the public URL.

ui_bugs.issue: Bookmaker select can stay empty right after account creation/page load; submitting then triggers backend 404 and transaction is not saved.
Bookmaker select can be empty during early interaction; first POST /api/bets returns 404 and bet is not saved in table.

integration_issues.issue: Observed intermittent POST /api/transactions -> 404 from frontend flow while backend tests for same endpoint pass; RCA points to empty bookmaker_id on early submit race.
Observed POST /api/bets -> 404 in UI flow; subsequent retry succeeds once bookmaker is populated.

issues: Console warnings from Recharts: width/height = -1 in ResponsiveContainer during render cycle.
Reports table area can render empty initially even after interactions, reducing data confidence for users.

action_items: Disable Transactions submit until bookmaker_id is set and options are loaded.
Disable Bets submit until bookmaker_id is set and options are loaded.
Show explicit inline/sonner error when bookmaker selection is invalid to avoid silent perceived failures.
Stabilize chart container sizing to remove Recharts -1 width/height warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: UI forms rely on async bookmaker fetch but submit buttons remain enabled before required state is ready, causing avoidable 404 integration failures.
Keep data-testid slug generation stable for accented labels (current auto-slugging with accents creates brittle selectors like nav-relat-rios).
Consider explicit loading/empty states on reports tables so users can distinguish 'no data yet' vs failed load.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple QA users via /api/auth/register during UI and backend tests (qa_*@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite is green (7/7). Frontend route coverage done, but transaction/bet submit race issue reproduced across runs with backend logs proving intermittent 404 from UI. Avoid re-running same selector loop; focus on fixing submit gating and retest those two forms first.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: register new account -> navigate quickly to Transactions or Bets -> submit before bookmaker select is reliably populated -> API receives empty/invalid bookmaker_id -> backend ownership check returns 404. Mitigation: make bookmaker_id required in UI state, disable submit while loading options, and prevent submit when selected option is empty.
